# mne_epochs_to_polars { #mdu.mne.mne2dataframe.mne_epochs_to_polars }

```python
mne.mne2dataframe.mne_epochs_to_polars(epo: mne.BaseEpochs)
```

Convert MNE Epochs object to Polars DataFrame.

Converts epoched EEG/MEG data from MNE format to a long-format Polars DataFrame.
Data is automatically scaled from Volts to microvolts (µV). If the epochs object
contains metadata, it is automatically joined to each epoch's data.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name   | Type           | Description                                                                    | Default    |
|--------|----------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| epo    | mne.BaseEpochs | MNE Epochs object (e.g., mne.Epochs, mne.EpochsArray) containing epoched data. | _required_ |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type         | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|--------|--------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | pl.DataFrame | Polars DataFrame with columns: - Channel columns: One column per channel with data in µV - time: Time in seconds relative to epoch onset - epoch_idx: Index identifying each epoch (0 to n_epochs-1) - sample_idx: Global continuous sample index across all epochs - Metadata columns: Any columns from epo.metadata (if present) |

## Examples {.doc-section .doc-section-examples}

```python
>>> import mne
>>> from mdu.mne.mne2dataframe import mne_epochs_to_polars
>>> # Create sample epochs
>>> info = mne.create_info(['Ch1', 'Ch2'], sfreq=100, ch_types='eeg')
>>> data = np.random.randn(5, 2, 50) * 1e-6  # 5 epochs, 2 channels, 50 times
>>> epochs = mne.EpochsArray(data, info)
>>> df = mne_epochs_to_polars(epochs)
>>> df.shape
(250, 5)  # 5 epochs * 50 timepoints, with Ch1, Ch2, time, epoch_idx, sample_idx
```

## See Also {.doc-section .doc-section-see-also}

mne_raw_to_polars : Convert continuous Raw data to DataFrame
